title: Second (Angular Excess) Proof of the Global Gauss-Bonnet Theorem

visual_sequence.observation: Face-by-face excess accumulates into 2 pi chi.
V minus E plus F survives across polyhedra.
Cutting a face changes the visible net but not the accounting logic.
All interior edge contributions cancel in the final sum.
